title: pseudoliparis schumanniana
side_effects: Pseudoliparis schumanniana can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, skin irritation, and respiratory issues. In severe cases, prolonged exposure or ingestion can lead to nausea, vomiting, and dizziness. Additionally, improper use may also cause headaches, fatigue, and increased heart rate. It's essential to consult with a medical professional before using the plant for any health-related purposes to avoid these potential side effects.
